commit_message:
Fix null pointer dereference in class member trigger expressions Fix null pointer dereference in class member trigger expressions ## Summary

 Trigger expressions for `@(...)` sensitivity lists are evaluated at simulation start, even for tasks that haven't been called yet. When sensitivity expressions access class members (e.g., `@(class_handle.event)` or `@(posedge class_handle.vif.signal)`), this caused null pointer dereferences because the class handle wasn't initialized with `new()` yet.

examples.commit_message:
Fix null pointer dereference in class member trigger expressions Fix null pointer dereference in class member trigger expressions ## Summary

 Trigger expressions for `@(...)` sensitivity lists are evaluated at simulation start, even for tasks that haven't been called yet. When sensitivity expressions access class members (e.g., `@(class_handle.event)` or `@(posedge class_handle.vif.signal)`), this caused null pointer dereferences because the class handle wasn't initialized with `new()` yet.
